creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Jan 22, 2009 at 12:05:26AM +0100, Philipp Wuensche wrote:
> Wesley Shields wrote:
> > Has the output of jls stabalized enough to address this problem now?
> 
> jls output stays the same for now in current and freebsd-7.1 as long as
> jails have an ipv4 address, so there is no imminent need for any changes
> in jailaudit.

So I should close this PR?

-- WXS
